scripts.verify: tsc --noEmit && next lint && npm run verify:scripts
scripts.verify:scripts: node scripts/verify-tajweed-colors.mjs && node scripts/verify-lesson-coloring.mjs && node scripts/verify-navigation.mjs && node scripts/verify-reading.mjs && node scripts/verify-reading-depth.mjs && node scripts/verify-reciters-data.mjs && node scripts/verify-sanitizer.mjs && node scripts/verify-security.mjs && node scripts/verify-study-tools.mjs
scripts.verify:ui: node scripts/verify-module-lock.mjs && node scripts/verify-mushaf.mjs && node scripts/verify-newfeatures.mjs && node scripts/verify-questions.mjs && node scripts/verify-reciters.mjs
